title: Satoshi Nakamoto
description: Satoshi Nakamoto is the pseudonym used by the person or group that designed and launched Bitcoin. The disappearance of that identity is part of Bitcoin's separation from a permanent founder or controlling authority.

resources.title: The Book of Satoshi
resources.notes: Primary-source collection of Satoshi's writings and early Bitcoin discussions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Whitepaper
resources.notes: The founding design document published under the Satoshi Nakamoto pseudonym.
